events.name: Borussia Mönchengladbach at 1. FC Union Berlin

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund conceded two goals in three minutes to slump to a 2-0 defeat by relegation-threatened VfL Bochum in their mini Ruhr valley derby on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund slump to another league loss under Kovac

video.headline: Georgios Masouras gets on the scoresheet for VfL Bochum

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Georgios Masouras gets on the scoresheet for VfL Bochum) 2025/02/15 ESHEET

headlines.description: Bundesliga leaders Bayern Munich had to survive some relentless pressing from champions Bayer Leverkusen to escape with a 0-0 draw in their top-of-the-table clash on Saturday and maintain their eight-point advantage at the summit.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern keep 8pt lead after draw with Leverkusen

video.headline: Jeremie Frimpong heads against the bar for Leverkusen

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Jeremie Frimpong heads against the bar for Leverkusen) 2025/02/15 ESHEET
